name: Chocolate Turtle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix the vanilla wafers and melted margarine in a bowl until well combined.
3. Spread the mixture evenly on the bottom of a springform pan.
4. Microwave the caramels according to package instructions; stir until smooth.
5. Pour the caramel over the crust, spreading it evenly.
6. Stir together evaporated milk and pecans; spread over the caramel.
7. In another bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, eggs, and chocolate chips until smooth.
8. Pour this mixture over the pecan layer.
9. Bake for 1 hour or until set.
10. Let cool before serving.
Chocolate chips should be melted.
